5-year relative book-to-market ratio compared to historical averages for the second module.
5-year relative cash flow-to-price ratio compared to historical averages for the second module.
5-year relative dividend yield compared to historical averages for the second module.
5-year relative EBITDA-to-price ratio compared to historical averages for the second module.
5-year relative EPS-to-price ratio compared to historical averages for the second module.
5-year relative free cash flow-to-price ratio compared to historical averages for the second module.
5-year relative operating cash flow-to-price ratio compared to historical averages for the second module.
5-year relative sales-to-price ratio compared to historical averages for the second module.
Industry-adjusted 12-month relative price strength compared to industry averages for the second module.
Regression error of 60-month CAPM used for trend analysis for the second module.
Revenue per employee calculated as trailing 12-month sales divided by the number of employees for the second module.
Return on equity calculated as net income divided by shareholder equity for the second module.
Return on invested capital calculated as net income and interest expenses divided by invested capital for the second module.
Quick ratio calculated as current assets minus inventory divided by current liabilities for the second module.
Change in trailing 12-month sales relative to EPS for the second module.
5-year sales growth calculated as the difference between trailing 12-month sales and sales 20 quarters ago for the second module.
Change in quarterly sales relative to gross profit margin over the last year for the second module.
Change in trailing 12-month sales relative to accounts receivable for the second module.
Year-over-year change in inventory as a percentage of sales for the second module.
Stock return volatility calculated as the standard deviation of monthly returns over the last 60 months for the second module.
Skewness of 90-day daily excess returns calculated as the asymmetry of daily excess price returns for the second module.
Skewness of 90-day daily returns calculated as the asymmetry of daily price returns for the second module.
Slope of the 52-week price trend line calculated using regression analysis for the second module.
Slope of the 66-week price trend line calculated using regression analysis for the second module.
Dispersion of FY1 EPS estimates calculated as standard deviation divided by mean for the second module.
Dispersion of FY2 EPS estimates calculated as standard deviation divided by mean for the second module.
Change in EPS relative to operating cash flows over the last year for the second module.
1-year change in EPS scaled by total assets for the second module.
Street consensus rating calculated as the average analyst recommendation for the second module.
Real earnings surprise calculated as the difference between actual EPS and consensus forecasts for the second module.
Sustainable growth rate calculated as ROE multiplied by (1 - dividend payout ratio) for the second module.
Tobin's Q ratio calculated as the market value of equity plus debt divided by assets for the second module.
Total coverage ratio measuring operating cash flow divided by debt payments for the second module.
Yearly trailing 12-month total sales growth rate calculated as a percentage change for the second module.
1-year price momentum indicator calculated using correlation-based analysis for the second module.
Accounting accruals calculated as the difference between trailing 12-month net income and operating cash flow for the second module.
Trailing 12-month capital expenditures-to-price ratio calculated as capital expenditures per share divided by price for the second module.
Trailing 12-month sales-to-enterprise value ratio calculated as sales divided by enterprise value for the second module.
24-month residual return variance calculated as the variance of monthly residual returns for the second module.
Free cash flow-to-enterprise value ratio calculated over trailing 12 months for the second module.
Forward EPS-to-enterprise value ratio based on consensus estimates for the second module.
Visibility ratio calculated as the most recent daily trading volume divided by the average daily trading volume over the last 50 days for the second module.
Working capital-to-inventory ratio calculated as working capital divided by inventory for the second module.
Unexpected change in inventory scaled by total assets for the second module.
Interest coverage ratio calculated as operating income divided by interest expenses for the second module.
Average trading volume over the preceding 6 months calculated as the moving average of monthly turnover for the second module.
Trading turnover ratio calculated as monthly trading volume divided by shares outstanding for the second module.
30-week moving average price divided by 75-week moving average price for the second module.
26-week relative price strength calculated as the most recent weekly closing price divided by the price 26 weeks ago for the second module.
39-week return with a 4-week lag calculated as the price change from week t-43 to week t-4 for the second module.
Working capital-to-total assets ratio calculated as average working capital divided by average total assets for the second module.
Predicted dividend yield based on payout ratio and forward EPS estimates for the second module.
Year-over-year change in accruals-to-assets ratio for the second module.
Year-over-year change in current ratio for the second module.
Year-over-year change in leverage calculated as total liabilities as a percentage of assets for the second module.
Year-over-year change in gross profit margin for the second module.
Year-over-year change in return on assets for the second module.
